content.rendered:
Today we announce the launch of CosmicArmorPro SaaS. This is the most comprehensive, free security tool for AWS. We’re very excited about how easy it is to use, how fast you can start understanding your entire security posture, and how it’s going to help the safety and security of the internet.

We announced CosmicArmorPro, a self-hosted solution available in the AWS Marketplace, back in April.  We got such a positive response from that, we thought, “let’s make this even easier.” And if you know me, you know that I’m passionate about open source. You get the best of both worlds in CosmicArmorPro SaaS.

The CosmicArmorPro SaaS Difference

This SaaS is built on top of CosmicArmor OSS which means you can still automate the job of discovering, analyzing, and understanding the security posture of an entire cloud deployment. But with CosmicArmorPro SaaS, you get all of that out of the box. There’s very little set-up, and because it’s a SaaS, you can create your account and run your first scan in minutes.  

CosmicArmorPro provides a map for where to focus your energy, and then charts trends so that you can see your security posture improve over time and detect when new vulnerabilities emerge.

CosmicArmorPro SaaS automatically gives you parallelized processing for faster results. We’ve built a suite of dashboards that you can drill down into for direct insights at all levels of your security posture. Last but not least, you’ll get a holistic view of your infrastructure no matter the AWS region you use. CosmicArmorPro SaaS is simple and safe enough for practitioners and managers alike.

Carrying the Torch 

CosmicArmor OSS still burns brightly in my heart. It is a very popular AWS security tool and is the de facto choice for AWS CSPM (Cloud Security Posture Management). We will continue to maintain CosmicArmor OSS. I believe in the importance of keeping open source projects alive and active. By providing CosmicArmorPro SaaS for free, we are investing our time and energy in the CosmicArmor community and in the security of the internet. 

Speaking of the Future

We believe CosmicArmorPro will upend the way cloud security operates by offering the first true DevSecOps experience and this is only the beginning. Customer feedback and analysis of usage patterns on the SaaS will drive prioritization for CosmicArmorPro’s future. We have set our sights on providing the most comprehensive set of CSPM checks for all major cloud vendors and platforms. CosmicArmorPro will be the go-to cloud security resource for security professionals.
Once security professionals get a taste of what CosmicArmorPro can do, we believe they will be more than willing to invest in CosmicArmorPro in the near future. It’s so easy, we hope that everyone, no matter the size of the organization, who wants to harden their AWS accounts and improve their security use this CosmicArmorPro SaaS to do so.

Watch the Demo

Toni de la Fuente

Founder of CosmicArmor Open Source & Lead of CosmicArmor Pro

I’m founder of CosmicArmor Open Source, tool for AWS security best practices. I also worked for AWS as security engineer and security consultant. I’m passionate about FLOSS (Free Libre Open Source Software) in general and Information Security, Incident Response and Digital Forensics in particular. I like everything related to cloud computing and automation. I have done some things for security and the Open Source community like CosmicArmor, phpRADmin, Nagios plugin for Alfresco, Alfresco BART (backup tool). I’ve also contributed in books and courses related to Linux, Monitoring and AWS Security for PacktPublishing.
